# getascraper/how-to-scrape-uline

> Uline Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts product catalog data from Uline. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Uline scraper and industrial supply product data extraction API
- Extracts: SKUs, names, base prices, quantity pricing tiers, dimensions, shipping weights, images, and availability
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-uline/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/uline-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~uline-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/uline-scraper

## How it works
1. Choose a scraping mode: search by keyword, provided URLs, or full catalog discovery
2. The actor visits Uline category and product pages and extracts structured product records
3. Results are written to a dataset that can be exported or fetched over the API

## Target site characteristics
- Uline.com is North America's largest shipping, packaging, and industrial supply catalog
- Tens of thousands of SKUs across boxes, packaging, storage, and janitorial product lines
- Covers three regional storefronts: United States, Canada, and Mexico

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://www.uline.com/BL_*/* (category and subcategory listing pages)
- https://www.uline.com/Product/Detail/* (individual product pages)

## Pricing
- Free tier: included
- Paid: $4.00 per 1,000 results

## Output schema (highlights)
- sku: Unique Uline SKU or model number
- unit_price: Base single-unit price in the regional currency
- price_tiers: All quantity price breaks for bulk discount analysis
- weight_lbs: Shipping weight in pounds
- in_stock: Whether the product is currently in stock

## Use cases
- Procurement teams benchmarking bulk pricing tiers against current suppliers
- Resellers monitoring packaging material costs to protect margins

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-uline/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~uline-scraper/issues
